notes: npm audit shows 0 vulnerabilities. Tests: 85/85 planned (PR #33 pending merge, currently 79). CSS perf: 16 transition:all replaced with specific properties (PR #31). Express v5 and chokidar v5 major updates still need issue discussion. CDN dep pinning is future work.
